title: Faithful Zephhyre 64x
description: This is an updated version of the Zephhyre texture pack originally made back in 1.7.
body:
# Faithful Zephhyre 64x

## By RodrigoTR

Made again available for newer versions of Minecraft! The legendary texture pack for PvP made by Zephhyre all the way back in the McPvP days is back online for download with updated compatibility and new additions! Experience the old pack like it was meant to be originally, PvP focused with emphasis on the old style Minecraft strove for before the new retexturing made by Jappa. 

Pack has 1.19 selected as the compatible version, but should have no problem with others as well, not tested with every release and snapshot, but there is no reason for it not to work.
